faqs.question: How much does cockroach extermination cost in Passaic, NJ?
faqs.answer: Cockroach extermination in Passaic typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and type of treatment required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a cockroach problem in Passaic?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for cockroach emergencies in Passaic. Our team understands that roach infestations require immediate attention, especially in multi-unit buildings where pests can spread quickly between apartments.

faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in Passaic homes?
faqs.answer: Passaic properties most commonly experience German cockroaches in kitchens and bathrooms, and American cockroaches in basements and areas near plumbing. We also treat Oriental cockroaches and brown-banded roaches found throughout residential and commercial buildings in the area.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your cockroach extermination services in Passaic?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand behind our work with a comprehensive service guarantee. If cockroaches return between scheduled treatments, we'll re-treat your Passaic property at no additional charge. We also offer ongoing maintenance plans to prevent future infestations.
